ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that recorded the data */,
  "time" REAL /* Timestamp of data collection */,
  "y_0sum" INTEGER /* Aggregate sum value for a metric */,
  "y_0product" INTEGER /* Product value for a metric */,
  "y_0triggeredAdd" INTEGER /* Flag indicating triggered actions */,
  "y_0multiSwitch" INTEGER /* Count of multi-switch activations */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Flag to indicate the quality of the data */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the sensor location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the sensor location */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the sensor */,
  "signal_strength" REAL /* Signal strength of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the sensor manufacturer */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule for maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., admin, analyst, operator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user logged in */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user logged in */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user (e.g., IP-based geolocation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert generated (e.g., threshold breach) */,
  "alert_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the alert has been resolved */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* User ID of the user assigned to handle the alert */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Description of the action taken to resolve the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_controls" (
  "command_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each command */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor associated with the command */,
  "command_type" TEXT /* Type of command (e.g., turn on, turn off) */,
  "command_value" TEXT /* Value associated with the command */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the command was issued */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being controlled */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device being controlled */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the command */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the command failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("command_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_controls_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_controls_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictive_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "last_trained" TEXT /* Date when the model was last trained */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "training_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the training data */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* JSON string of model parameters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the predictive model being assessed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the performance measurement */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., accuracy, F1 score) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used for performance evaluation */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the model was evaluated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES predictive_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "sent_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the notification */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "setting_description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was recorded */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the system component */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the component */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last status check */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the status */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the component is running */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_status_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
